title: Ideal Gas Law Interactive Simulator
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: Piston-and-particles animation that lets students adjust P, V, T, and n while solving PV = nRT for any variable.

learningObjectives: Use PV = nRT to calculate an unknown variable
Relate kinetic particle behavior to macroscopic gas variables

keyQuestions: What happens to pressure if volume decreases at constant T and n?
How does temperature affect molecular speed in the visualization?
commonMisconceptions: Particles slow down when pressure increases despite constant temperature
assessmentOpportunities: Have students record observations for Boyle's, Charles', and Avogadro's laws
